meanings.definition: a small cosmetics case with a mirror; to be carried in a woman's purse
a signed written agreement between two or more parties (nations) to perform some action
have the property of being packable or of compacting easily
examples: Such odd-shaped items do not pack well

meanings.definition: make more compact by or as if by pressing
closely and firmly united or packed together
having a short and solid form or stature
briefly giving the gist of something
examples: a compact style is brief and pithy
a summary formulation of a wide-ranging subject
